generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance SteeringActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis component responsible for steering control via servo actuators, interfacing with the Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for ego vehicle direction adjustments"
]

instance SpeedControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis component executing speed control commands via NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, translating desired speed into motor voltage commands through the Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

instance EmergencyBrakeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Remote-triggered braking system activated via Control Panel FE with 100ms latency, ensuring compliance with ISO 15622 safety standards"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing 3D object detection with point cloud generation for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloud
]

instance DepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera capturing environmental context via stereo vision for object tracking and environmental awareness"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageData
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard speed sensor measuring ego vehicle velocity in real-time for ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard steering angle sensor tracking ego vehicle orientation for path planning and ACC coordination"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance ObjectProximitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Combination of LiDAR and camera sensors detecting objects in proximity via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTrackData
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance LiDARPointCloud : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ObjectProximitySensor
]

// C10: Models
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based kinematic model of the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle capturing speed/steering dynamics for ACC simulation"
]

instance ObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering model processing LiDAR point clouds to generate object tracks (position/velocity) for ACC coordination"
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 compliant ACC control logic executed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for performance-class adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Jetpack50SDK
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) facilitating inter-component communication, message serialization, and real-time data synchronization (100ms latency)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Jetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK enabling hardware acceleration for ACC computations on Jetson devices"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlLogicModel
]

instance Python38Environment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 development environment for rapid prototyping of data processing and control logic components"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink platform for complex systems modeling (e.g., point cloud clustering) and digital twin validation"
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL-based data storage handling historical analysis of object tracks and ego vehicle state for predictive maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HistoricalObjectData
]

instance RVizVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 RViz tool for real-time 3D visualization of object tracks, ego vehicle state, and projected driving paths"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

// C12: Data
instance RawLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for initial environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloud
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Filtered and clustered object tracks (position/velocity) generated via DBSCAN + Kalman filtering from LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, SQLDatabase
]

instance EgoVehicleState : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time state data (speed, steering angle) of the ego vehicle for ACC control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, ACCControlLogicModel
]

instance HistoricalObjectData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series historical data of detected objects stored in SQL databases for predictive maintenance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized data for 3D visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected paths"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloud, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RVizVisualization
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization FE, with report generation for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, HistoricalReportAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from vehicle ECU to Digital Twin Entity, executing computations on cloud/edge hardware (NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0) for ISO 15622 performance-class ACC"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComplianceInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking via Control Panel FE with 100ms Wi-Fi latency"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ACC accuracy (distance-to-lead-vehicle compliance) via 3D Visualization FE showing ego vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance HistoricalReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable time-series reports from historical object tracks and ego vehicle state data for predictive maintenance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCComplianceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of ISO 15622 compliance for ACC control logic execution and performance metrics"
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of desired cruise speed via Control Panel FE with 100ms latency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking trigger via Control Panel FE ensuring 100ms latency for safety-critical operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data analysis of brake/motor health from stored object tracks and ego vehicle state for predictive maintenance"
]

// C17: Environment
instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SteeringActuator, SpeedControlActuator, EmergencyBrakeActuator,
                 LiDARSensor, DepthCamera, SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor,
                 ObjectProximitySensor, ROS2Middleware, Jetpack50SDK, Python38Environment,
                 MATLABSimulink, SQLDatabase, RVizVisualization, ACCControlLogicModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction occurs via the **Actuation FE** in the Digital Twin Entity, which sends desired speed commands to the vehicle’s speed controller (Vedder Electronic Speed Controller) via the Physical Twin Entity. The ACC control logic (implemented in the **Controlling FE**) computes speed adjustments based on lead vehicle distance, and actuation commands are transmitted over Wi-Fi to the vehicle’s onboard hardware (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time-scale operates at **real-time granularity** with a **synchronization interval of ≤100ms** between the Digital Twin Entity and Physical Twin. Data collection and processing occur at **perception cycle rates** (typically 10–30 Hz for LiDAR/camera data), while control commands are transmitted at **100ms intervals** to ensure safe, deterministic actuation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation is **centralized** with a hierarchical architecture:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensors/actuators (LiDAR, camera, speed controller) and pre-processing logic (Data Pre-Processing FE, Actuation FE).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (Data Collecting FE), control logic (Controlling FE), and reporting (Reporting FE).
  - **User Entity**: Provides interfaces (3D Visualization FE, Control Panel FE) for monitoring/management.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for cross-entity data alignment (e.g., unit conversions, message serialization)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin spans **three lifecycle stages**:
  1) **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC validation (simulated driving paths, object tracking).
  2) **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance during vehicle operation.
  3) **Lifecycle Management**: Supports digital threads for product lifecycle management (data storage via SQL databases external to the vehicle)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: Control logic adheres to ISO 15622 (performance-class I ACC) and 3GPP V2V communication standards (≤100ms latency).
  - **Validation**: Real-time synchronization via **clock synchronization (±100ms)** and **perception cycle testing** (10–30 Hz).
  - **Uncertainty**: LiDAR/camera data processed via DBSCAN + Kalman filtering to mitigate noise in object tracking.
  - **Safety**: Emergency braking commands are prioritized over ACC control to prevent accidents."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs:
  - **Internal Communication**: ROS2 network for intra-entity (e.g., between Data Collection FE and Visualization FE) and inter-entity (e.g., between Digital Twin Entity and Physical Twin Entity) messaging.
  - **External Communication**: Wi-Fi (UDP-based) for low-latency (<100ms) inter-vehicle communication between the DT and Physical Twin.
  - **Network Protocols**: ROS2 (ROS 2.0) for middleware, Wi-Fi for real-time data transfer."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed in a **hybrid cloud-edge architecture**:
  - **Edge Layer**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (onboard vehicle) hosts the Physical Twin Entity and ACC control logic.
  - **Cloud Layer**: External storage (SQL databases) and compute resources (NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0) offload data processing and reporting.
  - **Deployment Tools**: ROS2 packages for modular component deployment, Python/C++ for node lifecycle management."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration occurs with:
  - **External Systems**: Data exchange with other DTs or IoT platforms via standardized communication interfaces (e.g., ROS2 topics), though no specific external DTs are referenced in this case study."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **shared**:
  - The **Physical Twin Entity** owns raw sensor data (LiDAR/camera outputs) and actuation commands.
  - The **Digital Twin Entity** processes and stores derived data (object tracks, vehicle state) in external SQL databases, with access controlled via the User Entity (Control Panel FE). Privacy is not explicitly addressed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture (RA) adapted for automotive use, with custom entities (Physical Twin Entity) and decomposed User Interface FE.
  - **ISO 15622**: ACC control logic specifications (performance-class I).
  - **3GPP 22.185**: V2V communication latency requirements (<100ms).
  - **ROS2**: Standardized middleware for inter-component communication."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed via:
  - **Safety**: Emergency braking commands are prioritized; clock synchronization (±100ms) ensures deterministic control.
  - **Cybersecurity**: No explicit mention of encryption/access controls, but ROS2 security features (e.g., authentication) could be implemented for remote management.
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Operators use the DT to monitor/manage ACC, with no autonomous decision-making without human oversight (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop)."
]
